examples.title: Johnson's Algorithm
examples.description: All-pairs shortest paths with negative weights
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Johnson
BEGIN
   Add node q with 0-weight edges to all nodes
   if Bellman-Ford(q) finds negative cycle:
      abort
   for each edge (u,v):
      h[u] = dist from q
      w'(u,v) = w(u,v) + h[u] - h[v]
   for each node u:
      run Dijkstra with w' to get δ'(u,v)
      actual δ(u,v) = δ'(u,v) - h[u] + h[v]
END
examples.explanation: Reweighting eliminates negatives while preserving path relationships
